equivalent_mutants.rationale: Error message format-string mutation — cosmetic; same ValueError raised, same tests pass.

BeforeValidator returning None: Pydantic v2 falls back to the original input when BeforeValidator returns None, making the mutation equivalent. Tests don't observe the validator's return value directly — they observe the parsed field, which still receives 'FR-1'.

exclusion_rationale: Per SPEC §'Mandatory Mutation Testing', pure data containers, constants, and error-message format strings are exempt from the mutation gate. Pydantic v2 BeforeValidator returning None is also equivalent because Pydantic falls back to the original input when the validator returns None.
